reviewer_note: Provisional SIA-first policy (v2): direct lake measurements (kitesailing/windsurfcenter/silvaplana_lake) always outrank SIA; SIA is the principal reference when no lake reading exists; a missing SIA hour stays UNLABELED - Samedan is deliberately excluded as a default label (allow_samedan_fallback=false) and may only be re-enabled inside an explicitly named research experiment (legacy_samedan_proxy), never silently. sia_confidence is null on purpose: SIA's measurement quality (official MeteoSwiss station) is a separate question from its equivalence to the Windsurfcenter/lake target, which is UNMEASURED - only 5 lake readings exist as of 2026-07-17, far below the 14-independent-day minimum reporting gate in station_calibration.py. Any future change to relationship_classification/approved_transformations requires a reviewed edit of this file citing a real station_calibration.py report - never an automatic write by any script.
